name: Ascendus - Looksmax & Glow Up
subtitle: AI Appearance Score & Improvement Plan
description:
Ascendus gives you a brutally honest AI-powered appearance score and a personalized 12-week plan to reach your best self.

🔬 BRUTALLY ACCURATE AI SCORING
Get your Glow Score — a 0–10 rating based on facial harmony, angularity, sexual dimorphism, and feature symmetry. No filters. No flattery. Just real data.

📊 4 PILLARS BREAKDOWN
See exactly what's holding you back across the 4 core pillars: Face, Body, Grooming, and Posture. Know your weakest link and attack it first.

🎭 CELEBRITY LOOKALIKE
Discover which celebrities share your facial structure and how close you are to their tier. See exactly what traits to develop to close the gap.

📅 12-WEEK PERSONALIZED PLAN
Based on your phase (Cut / Bulk / Recomp / Maintenance), Ascendus builds a daily protocol covering training, nutrition, skincare, grooming, and posture.

📈 PROGRESS TRACKING
Rescan every 2 weeks and watch your score climb. Side-by-side before/after comparisons show exactly how far you've come.

🤖 AI IMPROVEMENT COACH (Pro)
Ask your personal AI coach anything — "How do I improve my jawline score?" "What's my fastest path to Chadlite?" — and get personalized answers based on your actual scan data.

🏆 ACHIEVEMENTS & STREAKS
Unlock badges, maintain daily streaks, and compete on the global leaderboard. Gamified self-improvement that actually works.

Join 10,000+ men already looksmaxxing with Ascendus.

PRO FEATURES:
• Unlimited scans
• All 3 celebrity matches
• Full 12-body-metric breakdown
• Score projection
• AI Improvement Coach (10 msgs/scan)
• Streak freezes

SCORES ARE FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT PURPOSES ONLY AND ARE NOT MEDICAL ASSESSMENTS.
